movie.actors: Burt Reynolds, Ned Beatty, Jim Nabors, Parker Stevenson
movie.plot: The title character, a popular NASCAR driver, clashes with the fried-chicken mogul that sponsors his racing team.
movie.title: Stroker Ace
movie.writer: William Neely (novel), Robert K. Ottum (novel), Hugh Wilson (screenplay), Hal Needham (screenplay), David E. Peckinpah
